topic: A mysterious black magician (Odiyan) who can shape-shift into animals at night in a Palakkad village
previous_summary: Radhika, terror-stricken by the fresh bloodstains at her doorstep, gathers her fearful family and neighbours, who are further alarmed when the village elder, Narayanan Ashan, confirms the blood is from the Odiyan, prompting them to guard her house as a mysterious howl echoes from the distant forest at dusk.
